title: Functional characterization of 42 CK2α de novo variants associated with Okur-Chung neurodevelopmental syndrome
abstract_snippet: 42 CK2α variants in OCNDS characterized for enzymatic activity; many had reduced/no activity but some showed no change, suggesting other mechanisms.
summary: Functional characterization of 42 de novo CSNK2A1 variants in Okur-Chung NDD syndrome. 13/42 had zero enzymatic activity, but 5 variants showed normal activity/stability, suggesting mechanisms beyond kinase function drive NDD. Relevant to understanding how coding variants in NDD genes produce phenotypes through non-obvious mechanisms.
